product.name: Aramid Vis 150
product.categorySourceGroup: Inherent Flame Retardant Aramid Viscose Fr Woven Workwear Fabrics
product.titleDescriptor: Aramid Viscose Fr Fabric, 53% Viscose Fr 40% meta Aramid 5% para Aramid 2% Carbon , 150 gr/m'2
product.specLine: 150 g/m², 53% Viscose fr 40% m-Aramid 5% p-Aramid 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, 1/1 Plain Fabric Aramid Viscose fr blend fabric
descriptions: 150 g/m², 53% viscose fr 40% m-Aramid, 5% p-Aramid, 2% Carbon.
for firefighters cloth inside lining, , oil and gas industry workers.
With high contect of viscose fr fiber, the fabric is ultra comfortable to wear and and absorb sweat. Inherent flame retardant fabric with EN ISO 11612 certification.
Resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034)
Aramid Viscose Fr Fabric, 53% Viscose Fr 40% meta Aramid 5% para Aramid 2% Carbon , 150 gr/m'2
150 g/m², 53% Viscose fr 40% m-Aramid 5% p-Aramid 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, 1/1 Plain Fabric Aramid Viscose fr blend fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 53% Viscose Fr (cv fr) 40% m-Aramid (m-AR) 5% p-Aramid (p-AR) 2% Carbon(CF) | EN ISO 2076
Tensile Strength | Warp > 750N; Weft > 600N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>40N ; Weft>30N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Flame and Heat Protection | Yes | EN ISO 11612

evidence: for firefighters cloth inside lining, oil and gas industry workers.
matches.rationale: Explicit statement that the fabric is used as firefighter cloth inside lining, directly supporting firefighting application.
EN ISO 11611 is the explicit standard for protective clothing used in welding and allied processes, directly tying the fabric to welding/metal-splash protection.
